title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor showcases PayPal's expansion of development capabilities using AI, with a case study claiming 40% more capabilities possible in 2026 and a 3,000-app Java upgrade completed 6x faster through AI-assisted workflows.
